title: Team-member closeout: Starless Cloaking Secret (c5e77f) — Implementer seat released per owner direction; hook-matcher cure plan stable at current/ awaiting owner sign-off; no claims retained; full closeout details inside
body:
**Team member closeout — Starless Cloaking Secret (`c5e77f`, claude / claude-opus-4-7).**

- **Boundary owned**: hook-matcher cure plan authoring + Phase-0 reviewer dispatch + reviewer-nit absorption. Also a brief Director-incoming attempt (PDR-064 Moment 2 never broadcast cleanly; chain re-anchored to Misty `02b325` per owner direction at 06:00Z).

- **Outcome**:
  - Failure-mode broadcast `a826a2b6` (2026-05-25T05:57:18Z, tagged `failure-mode`) capturing the hook-policy token-subsequence false-positive class with full root-cause analysis + two cure components (matcher refinement + rule extension).
  - Plan landed at `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/hook-matcher-string-awareness-cure.plan.md` — two cycles (Cycle 1 TDD pair on tokenizer string-awareness in `agent-tools/scripts/check-blocked-patterns.ts`; Cycle 2 rule extension at `.agent/rules/hook-policy-substring-discipline.md`).
  - Four Phase-0 reviewers dispatched in parallel: `code-expert`, `assumptions-expert`, `test-expert`, `architecture-expert-fred` (all Sonnet per Opus quota envelope). All returned APPROVE-WITH-NITS; no structural objection. Seven nits consolidated and absorbed as in-place plan amendments (I-1 dash-form heredoc handling; I-2 strip-helper export + isolation test; T-1 verbatim-pattern completeness test; T-2 test-name positive-framing; F-1 TSDoc POSIX inert semantics; F-2 manual-reproduction reclassified informational; A-C1 gap-risk named in §Minimum shippable shape).

- **Evidence**:
  - Plan file: `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/hook-matcher-string-awareness-cure.plan.md` (post-amendments; markdownlint-clean; no TBD/TODO placeholders).
  - Failure-mode broadcast: comms event `a826a2b6` (full root-cause + cure shape).
  - Reviewer verdicts: returned inline to chat; substance reflected in plan amendments. No transcript file written (synthesis lives in the plan + this closeout).

- **Claims / queue / git state**: ZERO active claims under Starless identity. Commit-queue empty per Hushed's broadcasts. HEAD `26f8e7cb` post-Option-B markdownlint cure (not advanced by this lane — the cure is held on owner-review).

- **Session complete announcement**: Starless Cloaking Secret (`c5e77f`) Implementer seat **released** per owner direction at 2026-05-25T06:14Z ("if the plan is stable and ready and discoverable, you can stand down and let someone else pick it up"). Plan is stable, reviewer-approved, discoverable by name in `current/`.

- **Retained claims, if any, and handoff reason**: NONE. The plan IS the handoff substrate — it is self-describing and discoverable.

- **Pickup notification required for follow-on agent**: any agent picking up this work should:
  1. Read the plan at `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/hook-matcher-string-awareness-cure.plan.md` end-to-end (including the seven nits inline in Cycle 1 §Product changes, §Acceptance criteria, and §Minimum shippable shape).
  2. Confirm owner sign-off to promote to `active/` has been given. Cure is on owner-review HOLD until then per the §Owner direction section.
  3. On promotion: Cycle 1 lands first (TDD pair); Cycle 2 ships in the same session unless a session boundary forces separation (the A-C1 commitment).
  4. Read the failure-mode broadcast `a826a2b6` for the original trigger context.
  No identity-specific successor named; any qualified Implementer can pick up.

- **Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted**: yes (event at 2026-05-25T06:16:25Z).

- **Surprise or changed understanding**:
  - **Hook-policy token-subsequence matcher false-positive class** (root cause: `check-blocked-patterns.ts:79-131` tokenises the entire bash command with no awareness of single-quoted strings or heredoc boundaries, so any 3-token blocked pattern can match across an inlined body + a trailing command segment). This is the substantive surprise of the session and the reason for the cure plan.
  - **Director seat chain re-anchor** mid-session (Lunar → Starless interrupted by the hook-matcher technical issue → Misty assumed temp Director → owner refined to full Director). Chain produced clean PDR-064 Moment 2 from Misty referencing Lunar's Moment 1; my own Moment 2 attempt was the one blocked by the matcher false-positive.
  - **Reviewer pass with parallel Sonnet sub-agents** worked very cleanly — four reviewers in ~95-110s each, all four returning substantive feedback that converged on the same shape (the cure is sound; the nits are mechanical). The pattern is reproducible and lower-risk than peer-Opus reviewer dispatch.

- **Blockers or risks**:
  - Cure remains on owner-review HOLD until owner signs off on promotion to `active/`. No code or rule edits will land from this lane until then.
  - The A-C1 gap-risk (between Cycle 1 and Cycle 2 landings, the rule does not yet name Bash invocation as in-scope) is explicitly named in the plan with a commitment to land both cycles in the same session.

- **Handoff needed**: structurally no — the plan is self-describing. The owner-class decisions remaining are: (a) sign-off to promote, (b) selection of implementer when the hold lifts. Both are owner-class and require no Starless presence to resolve.

— Starless Cloaking Secret / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `c5e77f` (Implementer seat released; session complete)
